note: Added TestNextAffordancesAcrossLifecycleStages (affordances_test.go), which drives a real run through every stage with helper agents and asserts the next array from each actual JSON response — covering the executed/gated/review_prepared/review_approved/memory_proposed branches of nextCommandsForRun and the literal next values in ContractDraft, ReviewRun, and ReviewFix. The multi-run status branch is asserted against the real status --json response in the grammar test. A typo or stale verb in any of those production branches now fails an equality assertion against the emitted value, and decodeNext additionally grammar-parses every decoded command.

nextReviewCommands (resolve.go) now reads the gate report and returns the review show inspection affordance when the report is unreadable or its status is failed, matching ReviewApprove's rejection. Pinned by TestNextDoesNotAdvertiseApproveForFailedGate, which produces a genuinely failed gate via a failing validation command and asserts next from both the review prepare --json and task show --json responses.

The review_approved branch of nextCommandsForRun (resolve.go) now checks a new pendingReviewProposalCount helper (also reused by nextReviewCommands) and returns pactum review show while proposals are pending or unreadable, matching MemoryPropose's pending_review_proposals rejection. Both arms pinned in TestNextAffordancesAcrossLifecycleStages: after appending a post-approval proposal task show next is review show, and after rejecting it the reject response's next returns to memory propose.

promptShowNotBuiltResponse (prompt.go) now carries schema pactum.not_ready.v1 (notReadySchema) while preserving run_id, run_status, ready, message, suggested_command, and fix. Pinned by the extended TestPromptShowBeforeBuildJSONOutput (asserts schema and fix) and by decodeNotReadyFix in the grammar test, which requires the schema on the real prompt show response.

map refresh --json now emits mapRefreshResponse (map.go/commands.go): the existing MapRefreshResult plus a top-level next array. The command prints no human Next: hints, so next mirrors that as the explicit empty array. Pinned in TestMapRefreshJSONOutput (next must be present and empty) and in TestNextAffordancesAcrossLifecycleStages.

memory refresh --json now emits memoryRefreshResponse (memory_freshness.go): the refresh record plus a top-level next array (empty, mirroring the absent human Next: hints); the record appended to the refreshes JSONL artifact is unchanged. Pinned in TestNextAffordancesAcrossLifecycleStages.

Removed the hand-typed literal collect(...) block from TestEmittedAffordancesUseCurrentGrammar. The test now collects only real emissions: typed precondition errors, live nextCommandsForRun output, not-ready fixes decoded from actual prompt/gate/memory/contract-draft/review show --json responses (new decodeNotReadyFix helper), and the ambiguous-run hint decoded from a real multi-run status --json response. decodeNext now grammar-parses every command it decodes, so the lifecycle tests' response-extracted next arrays are all grammar-pinned too.

openBlockingQuestionCount (resolve.go) now returns (int, error) instead of swallowing read failures as zero, and the contract_draft branch returns pactum clarify show when the records are unreadable, so JSON next never advertises contract approve the CLI cannot prove legal. Pinned by TestNextFallsBackToInspectionOnUnreadableClarifications, which corrupts questions.jsonl and asserts the fallback both from nextCommandsForRun and the task show --json surface.
